title: Status Electrical Tape, 10 Meters Insulation, Electrical Insulating Tape, 5 Pack Assorted Colours, S5PKPVCETX6
features: VERSATILE USES: Perfect for electrical insulation and various home applications, making it a handy tool for DIY projects and repairs around the house.
GENEROUS LENGTH: Each roll offers 10 meters of tape, providing you with ample material for multiple tasks and projects.
ASSORTED COLOURS: The 5-pack comes in a range of colours, allowing for easy identification or creative applications in your projects.
ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from recyclable materials, this tape contributes to a more sustainable and environmentally friendly choice.
CERTIFIED QUALITY: CE certified, ensuring it meets high safety standards, providing you with confidence in its performance and reliability.
description: Product Description Status PVC tape can be used for electrical insulation as well as various other uses around the home. It comes in a 10-metre roll. Available in assorted colours. Comes with shrink wrapped packaging in white counter display unit (CDU). Recyclable materials and CE certified. High Standards of quality and conformity form the corner stone of our policy resulting in the continual growth of Status International.
